changeSet.author: ahri-inventory
changeSet.comment: Optional link from inventory equipment to analyzer registry

column.name: analyzer_id
column.remarks: FK to clinlims.analyzer.id when item is equipment

changeSet.author: ahri-inventory

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE constraint_schema = 'clinlims' AND constraint_name = 'fk_inventory_item_analyzer'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns base_col JOIN information_schema.columns ref_col ON ref_col.table_schema = 'clinlims' AND ref_col.table_name = 'analyzer' AND ref_col.column_name = 'id' WHERE base_col.table_schema = 'clinlims' AND base_col.table_name = 'inventory_item' AND base_col.column_name = 'analyzer_id' AND base_col.udt_name = ref_col.udt_name

changeSet.comment: Add analyzer FK only when analyzer table is compatible

changeSet.author: ahri-inventory
ahri-inventory
changeSet.comment: Reclassify CARTRIDGE rows that store equipment metadata to EQUIPMENT
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.inventory_item SET item_type = 'EQUIPMENT' WHERE item_type = 'CARTRIDGE' AND ( NULLIF(TRIM(model_number), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(serial_number), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(equipment_condition), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(ahri_tag), '') IS NOT NULL );
